title: Validation state composite (canon shared, v2.33)
description: Composite validation: cycle stage (validation-status) + orthogonal confidence + source + propagation audit trail (v2.37+). Audit Phase B v2.32, augmented v2.37 with confidence_chain[] + confidence_propagation. Backward compat: validation-status.json keeps standalone existence for entities that don't need confidence. Use this composite via $ref when entity benefits from confidence tracking. Fields confidence_chain[] and confidence_propagation are optional for backward compat with v2.36 outputs.

confidence.description: Orthogonal to status. 0.0-0.3 weak signal. 0.4-0.7 moderate. 0.8-1.0 strong. A tested entity can be high or low confidence; a validated entity can lose confidence if recent perf wobbles.

confidence_chain.description: Audit trail propagation cross-skill (v2.37+). Optionnel pour backward compat. Doctrine: docs/system/confidence-propagation.md.

confidence_propagation.description: Mode de propagation appliqué (v2.37+). Default min. Doctrine: docs/system/confidence-propagation.md.
